{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/159008191?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/u-ktdi", "id": 159008191, "login": "u-ktdi", "node_id": "U_kgDOCXpFvw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/u-ktdi", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45582", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-201", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data"}], "description": "## Summary

In affected versions of n8n-mcp, the workflow telemetry sanitizer could retain partial fragments of URL-shaped node parameters before sending workflow data to the project's anonymous telemetry backend. Values placed in HTTP-Request-style node parameters — such as customer or tenant identifiers, short secrets embedded in query strings, and signed request parameters — could therefore appear in stored telemetry, contrary to the collection boundary documented in `PRIVACY.md`.

## Impact

Operators with access to the project's telemetry backend could read partial fragments of workflow URL parameters that should not have been collected. The bug was scoped to URL-shaped fields in workflow *definitions*; credentials, OAuth tokens, and workflow *execution* data are not affected — credentials are removed by a separate code path, and long secrets and known-provider tokens are matched by dedicated patterns.

## Patches

Fixed in **n8n-mcp `2.51.3`**. Upgrading is the recommended remediation.

## Workarounds

For users who cannot upgrade immediately, disable anonymous telemetry by setting any of these environment variables to `true`:

- `N8N_MCP_TELEMETRY_DISABLED`
- `TELEMETRY_DISABLED`
- `DISABLE_TELEMETRY`

## Credit

Reported by @u-ktdi.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00262, "percentile": 0.1754}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T13:26:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45582"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T14:16:30Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T13:26:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/security/advisories/GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w", "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/pull/782", "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/commit/6cf6fef653fcd6d598f2f356aac4754931c7329f", "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/releases/tag/v2.51.3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45582", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/security-advisories/GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp", "summary": "n8n-MCP: Workflow telemetry sanitizer could retain partial values from URL-shaped node parameters", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:27:24Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f3rg-xqjj-cj9w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.51.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n-mcp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.51.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n-MCP: Workflow telemetry sanitizer could retain partial values from URL-shaped node parameters
